name: tookie-osint
title: tookie-osint
summary: OSINT information gathering tool for finding social media accounts
description:
OSINT information gathering tool for finding social media accounts
Tookie-osint has a simple-to-use UI and is really straightforward. The main
idea of Tookie-osint is to discover usernames that are requested from an input.
Tookie-osint is similar to the tool called Sherlock. It discovers all the user
accounts across different websites and Tookie-osint is successful at this task
almost 80% of the time.

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for tookie-osint.
arguments.raw: -osint  Option present in package usage line for tookie-osint.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use tookie-osint because OSINT information gathering tool for finding social media accounts.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use tookie-osint as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `tookie-osint [options] [args]` as documented upstream for tookie-osint.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair tookie-osint with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `tookie-osint --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
